overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing high-speed vehicle traversal through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player drives on elevated highways and through dense commercial districts with towering holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through neon-lit commercial district

events.description: vehicle accelerates along elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: speeding along elevated highway, navigating between towering holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling in same direction ahead on the highway

entered.detail: curved elevated roadway with reflective wet surface and yellow lane markings
dense cluster of vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall tower structure covered in rotating holographic advertisements
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising behind the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving on an elevated highway through a cyberpunk cityscape. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements line both sides of the road while the vehicle accelerates along the wet, reflective asphalt. A distant vehicle is visible ahead traveling in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with multi-level roadways

events.description: descends from elevated highway to street level intersection
navigates through intersection, turning slightly to follow the road

agents.ego_description: descending from highway and navigating through a major intersection with large digital billboards

entered.detail: large multi-lane intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals
massive flat digital billboard displaying advertisements on building facade
tall commercial building with regular grid of illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated highway into a large urban intersection surrounded by towering commercial buildings. Large digital screens dominate the left side while the vehicle navigates through the multi-lane crossing. The neon billboards from the previous segment remain visible but closer now.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial avenue lined with corporate signage and storefronts

events.description: continues straight through commercial district passing DATA INC building

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial district at high speed, passing illuminated storefronts and corporate signage

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead slowing down at intersection in the distance

entered.detail: tall building with vertical DATA INC neon signage running down the facade
covered walkway with illuminated shop fronts and advertisements
series of tall vertical digital display pillars lining the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial avenue with the DATA INC building prominently visible on the right. The street is lined with storefront canopies on the left and vertical advertising pillars on the right. The vehicle maintains high speed while navigating between other sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated roadway with sharp turns near corporate plaza

events.description: sharp right turn onto elevated ramp
transition from street level to elevated approach near destination district

agents.ego_description: taking sharp turns on elevated roadways, gaining height while approaching the destination district

entered.detail: large illuminated THORNTON corporate signage visible in the distance
massive red-toned digital advertisement screen on building facade
concrete overpass structure crossing above the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes sharp turns on elevated roadways, gaining elevation as it approaches the destination district. The THORNTON corporate signage becomes visible in the distance while a massive red digital billboard dominates the right side. The environment transitions from street-level commercial to elevated corporate plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza entrance with towering digital displays

events.description: slowing down as approaching destination building complex
comes to a stop near building entrance

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop at the destination building entrance surrounded by massive holographic displays

entered.detail: large corporate building complex with multiple towers and illuminated facades
tall array of stacked horizontal digital screens displaying advertisements
tall vertical neon light pillar running up the left side of the approach

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the destination shows the vehicle slowing down as it enters a corporate plaza dominated by massive stacked digital screens and neon pillars. The vehicle comes to a stop near the entrance of the destination building complex, surrounded by towering holographic displays and illuminated architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from an elevated highway down into a dense commercial district before ascending toward a corporate plaza. It begins with a rapid acceleration along wet, reflective asphalt lined with holographic advertisements, following another vehicle into the distance. As the car descends from the highway, the scene shifts into a sprawling urban intersection dominated by towering digital screens and multi-lane crossings. The movement then flows through a commercial avenue past the DATA INC building and storefront canopies, before the vehicle executes sharp turns to regain elevation toward the THORNTON corporate signage and a massive red billboard. Finally, the camera slows as it enters a corporate plaza, coming to a stop amidst stacked digital screens and illuminated architecture.
